## createRspeedy() function

The `createRspeedy` method can let you create a Rspeedy instance and you can customize the build or development process in Node.js Runtime.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare function createRspeedy(input: CreateRspeedyOptions): Promise<RspeedyInstance>;
```

</td><td>

</tbody></table>

**Returns:**

Promise&lt;[RspeedyInstance](./rspeedy.rspeedyinstance.md)<!-- -->&gt;

- Rspeedy instance.

## Example


```ts
import { createRspeedy } from '@lynx-js/rspeedy'

void async function () {
  const rspeedy = await createRspeedy({})
  await rspeedy.build()
}()
```
